item.title: Evil Neuroscience Part 2 - ECCO Chamber Bibliography
item.dc:creator: Jack LaRoche
item.description:
Evil Neuroscience Part 2 - ECCO Chamber Bibliography

Programming and Metaprogramming in the Human Biocomputer: Theory and Experiments John C Lilly

The Center of the Cyclone: An Autobiography of Inner Space John C Lilly

The Deep Self: Profound Relaxation and the Tank Isolation Technique John C Lilly

The Scientist: A Metaphysical Autobiography John C Lilly

KUBARK Counterintelligence Interrogation, 1963 U.S. Central Intelligence Agency

Special Considerations of Modified Human Agents as Reconnaissance and Intelligence Devices John C Lilly

Is Anyone Out There? The Scientific Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence Frank D. Drake

The Cosmic Connection: An Extraterrestrial Perspective Carl Sagan

item.title: Deextinction Nightmare Part 2 - Colossal Lies Bibliography
item.dc:creator: Jack LaRoche

Deextinction Nightmare Part 2 - Colossal Lies Bibliography

How to Build a Dinosaur: Extinction Doesn’t Have to Be Forever Jack Horner

How to Clone a Mammoth: The Science of De-Extinction Beth Shapiro

Happy Birthday Dire Wolf (Official Music Video) Stan Bush

Black-Footed Ferret Friend Colossal Biosciences

item.title: Deextinction Nightmare Part 1 - Nazi Cows
item.dc:creator: Jack LaRoche
item.description:
Deextinction Nightmare Part 1 - Nazi Cows Bibliography

Animals My Adventure Lutz Heck

Cow Hannah Velten

Horse Elaine Walker

The History of Four Footed Beasts And Serpents Conrad Gessner

On Aggression Konrad Lorenz

Breeding-back Wild Beasts: Aurochs, wild horse and quagga Daniel Foidl

Resurrection Science: Conservation, De-extinction and the Precarious Future of Wild Things M.R. O’Connor

item.title: Welcome To My Blog
item.dc:creator: Jack LaRoche
item.description: This is the first post in my blog. Welcome!
